step1.title: Create your account

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

ThreeStepsSection.subtitle: We've simplified the journey from a stocked fridge to a gourmet dish.

scan.title: Scan Ingredients
scan.description: Simply snap a photo of your fridge or pantry, our AI identifies everything in seconds.

ai.title: AI Suggests Recipes
ai.description: Get personalized recipe matches based on what you have and your dietary goals.

cook.title: Cook with Guidance
cook.description: Follow beautiful, interactive instructions with voice commands for a stress-free cooking experience.

alternatives.title: Smart Alternatives
alternatives.description: Missing something? Our AI suggests the best alternatives based on recipe chemistry and ingredients instantly.

scanner.title: Ingredients Scanner
scanner.description: Computer vision that recognizes over 2,000 types of ingredients instantly.

voice.title: Voice Guidance
voice.description: Keep your hands clean, control the app and read steps using only your voice.

shopping.title: Smart Shopping List
shopping.description: Intelligently grouped by store aisles to help you finish shopping faster.

nutrition.title: Nutritional Information
nutrition.description: Automatic calculation of macros and detection of allergens for every meal.

ChefSection.imageAlt: Professional chef preparing a delicious meal

waste.title: Reduce Food Waste
waste.description: Stop wasting your money. Our AI prioritizes ingredients close to their expiration dates.

time.title: Save Time & Mental Energy
time.description: End the daily argument about "what's for dinner" with smart, instant suggestions.

personalized.title: Personalized Cooking
personalized.description: FoodAI learns your tastes and preferences over time — whether you're vegan, gluten-free, keto, or any other diet.

stats.title: Hi: Sustainable
stats.description: FoodAI users reduce household food waste by an average of 34% in the first month.

TestimonialsSection.description: Join over 50,000 home cooks using FoodAI for revolutionary creations in their kitchens.

testimonials.name: Marcus Norton
testimonials.content: The alternatives editor is a real lifesaver. Being vegan in a small town is tough, but FoodAI always knows how to adapt any recipe for me.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.content: FoodAI has literally changed my relationship with cooking. I used to spend hours figuring out what to cook, now I just open the fridge and let AI guide me.

ai.title: AI That Understands Your Taste
ai.description: Our smart engine doesn't just suggest recipes, it analyzes your dietary habits and taste preferences to provide unique suggestions that evolve with you day by day.

voice.title: Voice Mode
voice.description: Cook without touching your phone, interact with the voice assistant to get steps and measurements.

reports.title: Advanced Nutrition Reports
reports.description: Charts showing your consumption of macros, vitamins, and minerals with instant tips to improve your health.

planning.title: Weekly Planning
planning.description: The 'what are we eating today' idea? A complete balanced plan in seconds.

header.description: Flexible plans designed to fit your lifestyle. Start for free today or elevate your experience with advanced AI features.

free.name: Free Plan
features: Daily nutrition and calorie tracking with 10 recipe views

basic.name: Basic Plan
features: Daily nutrition and calorie tracking with 20 recipe views

advanced.name: Advanced Plan
features: Daily nutrition and calorie tracking with 50 recipe views

pro.name: Professional Plan
features: Daily nutrition and calorie tracking with 100 recipe views

gold.name: Gold Plan
features: Daily nutrition and calorie tracking with unlimited recipe views

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
questions.answer: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time with no extra fees. Your plan will remain active until the end of your current billing period.

questions.question: What payment methods are available?
questions.answer: We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American Express, along with Apple Pay and Google Pay. All payments are encrypted and processed securely.

questions.question: How does the AI understand my needs?
questions.answer: Our AI analyzes your eating habits, preferences, health goals, and available ingredients. Over time, it learns from your usage and delivers more accurate, personalized recommendations.
